summary: Iteration 193 testing complete: Coven Leaderboard feature. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Rankings tab in coven panel with leaderboard-list showing empty state and populated state with coven data.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/sync/leaderboard returns 200 with correct structure - PASS
Leaderboard returns empty list when no covens exist - PASS
Leaderboard includes all required fields: rank, name, leader, member_count, forge_score, harvest_count, combined_score - PASS
Leaderboard sorted by combined_score descending - PASS
Regression: POST /api/sync/covens creates coven with 8-char invite code - PASS
Regression: POST /api/sync/covens/join returns 404 for invalid code - PASS
Regression: GET /api/sync/covens/my returns in_coven=false when not in coven - PASS
Regression: GET /api/sync/covens/my returns coven details when in coven - PASS
Frontend: /cosmic-map coven panel has Coven and Rankings tabs - PASS
Frontend: Rankings tab (data-testid=leaderboard-tab) opens leaderboard-list - PASS
Frontend: Leaderboard shows 'No covens yet' when empty - PASS
Frontend: Leaderboard rows show rank, name, score when covens exist - PASS
Frontend: Tab switching between Coven and Rankings works - PASS
seed_data_creation: Test covens created and cleaned up during tests (TEST_ prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 193 Coven Leaderboard fully working. The leaderboard endpoint GET /api/sync/leaderboard returns covens ranked by combined_score (forge_score + harvest_count*2). Frontend has tab-based UI in coven panel with 'Coven' and 'Rankings' tabs. Rankings tab shows leaderboard-list with rank, name, leader, member count, and combined score. Empty state shows 'No covens yet. Be the first!' message. Note: Trial graduation overlay may appear on first visit - dismiss with 'Continue with free plan' button.

backend_apis.GET /api/sync/leaderboard: Returns leaderboard array with rank, name, leader, member_count, forge_score, harvest_count, combined_score, online_count, coven_id. Sorted by combined_score descending.

coven_panel_tabs.coven_tab: Shows coven details or create/join forms

leaderboard_list.empty_state: Shows 'No covens yet. Be the first!'
leaderboard_list.populated_state: Shows leaderboard rows with rank (I, II, III or #N), name, leader, member count, combined score, online indicator
